title: Weekly Market Update: Tech Stocks Lead Market Lower, Basic Materials Gain
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Tech stocks led declines, while basic materials gained in the latest market update. Oracle and Broadcom fell sharply after earnings. The S&P 500 rose slightly.
excerpt: Tech stocks led declines, while basic materials gained in the latest market update. Oracle and Broadcom fell sharply after earnings. The S&P 500 rose slightly.

content.introduction: Tech stocks led declines, while basic materials gained in the latest market update. Oracle and Broadcom fell sharply after earnings. The S&P 500 rose slightly.

[Markets](https://www.morningstar.com/markets). [Vertiv Holdings Co Class A (VRT)](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnys/vrt/quote). [Bloom Energy Corp Class A (BE)](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnys/be/quote). [Oracle Corp (ORCL)](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnys/orcl/quote). [EchoStar Corp Class A (SATS)](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnas/sats/quote). Technology led the declines, falling 2.18% for the week as AI heavyweights Oracle [ORCL](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnys/orcl/quote) and Broadcom [AVGO](https://www.morningstar.com/stocks/xnas/avgo/quote) fell sharply after earnings. [View All](https://www.morningstar.com/markets).
